tasks.completion_summary: Phase 4 Yoga layout: new Strata.Layout.Yoga package (YogaLayoutPass maps computed style to a parallel Yoga tree per tech-design 4.1 and computes integer-cell rects), layout property descriptors, grid-as-flex emulation (native Yoga.Net 3.2.3 grid is non-functional - documented v1.1 fallback per plan risk), SpectreProjection layout overload (Grid for display:grid, absolute placement), multi-column dashboard demo. 155 tests green, clean net8.0;net10.0 build, AOT publish smoke passes.

Phase 5 INTERACTIONS (not legacy Behaviors). Task body described the deprecated imperative IBehavior/BehaviorHost/DI-keyed-service design; docs/05-interaction-redesign.md + 04-plan.md §Phase 5 + tech-design/spec/requirements supersession banners + decision log + recent commits all SUPERSEDE it with selector-bound IObservable<HostEvent>. Implemented the redesigned scope (push-back, goal-driven): new Strata.Interaction package - command: property (additive cascade, CSS-deviation documented), HostEvent records, IInputSource (Subject-backed), ICommandRegistry (single-reg-per-name, replaces DI keyed services), InteractionHost subscription-diff dispatcher (identity stable across re-cascade, detach-before-reattach), sample handlers (navigate/kill-confirm/sparkline). Additive merge via GetMatchedRules, no core cascade change. 183 tests green (+28), clean net8.0;net10.0 Release build, AOT analyzers clean (0 warnings, warnings-as-errors).
tasks.notes: RECOMMEND: update Dart task 4SrLff53j5D6 title/body from 'Phase 5 — Behaviors' to 'Phase 5 — Interactions'; the body is stale (created 2026-05-13, before the 2026-05-16 redesign).
